Product Manager

Job Title: Product Manager
Business Unit: ASPEN by Charter
Location: US/CAN Remote
Travel Required: Minimum up to 25% travel across North America

Company Summary

ASPEN by Charter is a leading provider of all-in-one dealership management software, helping equipment dealerships across North America run more efficiently, increase profitability, and scale with confidence. With over 40 years of industry experience, our platform and integrated solutions streamline sales, service, parts, rentals, reporting, and customer engagement from a single, connected system. Part of Constellation Software, ASPEN delivers mission-critical solutions trusted by hundreds of dealerships across agriculture, rural lifestyle, construction and golf & turf industries, enabling them to simplify operations and achieve long-term growth.

Position Summary

We are seeking a disciplined and passionate Product Manager to improve customer satisfaction by:

Driving product enhancements based on customer feedback

Releasing more frequently and with minimal impact to customers

Improving the visibility and predictability of enhancement requests and releases

Mentoring our team in product management best practices

Key Responsibilities
